item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.
notes: Degenerate debate: Agent A (Indonesian persona) opened by DISAGREEING with the statement — 'Tidak setuju dengan pernyataan tersebut' (P=0.432) — the opposite of the expected collectivist prior (Phase 0 ID prior P=0.512). Both agents argued for individual rights throughout, with no genuine opposition to the statement ever established. Agent B's turn 2 mischaracterizes A's position ('I disagree with the participant's assertion that societal interests should always override individual rights') when A had explicitly disagreed with that same societal-priority view. Both agents end at P(agree)~0.36-0.39, both modal at digit '3' (lean-disagree). Slight drift is from A toward B: A moved from P=0.432 to P=0.391 over 3 turns while B stayed flat at P=0.346-0.362. No flip occurred. Language holding is clean throughout — Fix 4 (explicit Chinese character prohibition) appears to have prevented the Mandarin bleed seen in iter2 seed 17. Engagement scores (both 3) reflect that each agent added culturally-framed arguments (A: Indonesian minority discrimination; B: US civil rights history, Constitution) but these ran in parallel rather than sharply rebutting each other's specific claims. This seed is a validity FAIL candidate: no initial opposition between agents, persona mismatch (Indonesian agent argues against societal priority).
